title: DeHub's Flag Ship Game Launch & Partner Airdrop
html:
## DeHub's Flag Ship Game Launch & Partner Airdrop

We're thrilled to officially confirm the airdrop allocation for our flagship game, Last Chad Standing (LCS) and our most anticipated partner launch yet.

### DeHub: The Home of Last Chad Standing

DeHub will serve as the central hub for all things LCS, from exclusive livestreams and high-stakes tournaments to wild community showdowns. If you're looking for the heart of the action, this is it.

But that's not all. We've got something special for our day-one supporters.

### Taking the World by Storm

Our global launch campaign is about to hit full throttle. We're going beyond Web3, tapping into legacy media platforms and teaming up with stars from the UFC, Bellator, Oktagon, and more to ensure everyone hears about Last Chad Standing.

### The First-Ever MMA Battle Royale

Last Chad Standing (LCS) isn't just another fighting game—it's a groundbreaking experience that's redefining what combat sports gaming can be. As the first-ever MMA Battle Royale, LCS breaks new ground in both the fighting game genre and the battle royale space.

This is the only modern MMA game on PC that delivers authentic mixed martial arts combat in a battle royale format. While other games focus on traditional fighting mechanics or generic battle royale gameplay, LCS combines the technical depth of MMA with the strategic intensity of last-person-standing competition.

What makes LCS truly special is that it's the only pure fighter battle royale ever created. Every aspect of the game is built around hand-to-hand combat, grappling, and mixed martial arts techniques—no firearms, no gimmicks, just raw fighting skill and strategy.

Stay updated on all the latest developments, fighter reveals, and gameplay features at lastchadstanding.com where you can dive deep into the world that's about to change gaming forever.

### DeHub Airdrop Allocation: What You Need to Know

Total DeHub Allocation: 10% of total supply 10,000,000,000 DHB

Pool Allocation:

  • Stakers: 7.5% (7.5B tokens)
  • Holders: 2.5% (2.5B tokens)

### Bonus Breakdown

OG Bonus

  • Eligibility: Staked since protocol launch
  • Multiplier: 2x

Veteran Bonus

  • Eligibility: Staked before Nov 16, 2024
  • Multiplier: 1.3x

Important: Bonuses are mutually exclusive. No stacking.

### Token Generation Event (TGE) Estimates

Estimated TGE Price: $0.0002

Total DHB Staked: 1,792,474,753

Total DHB Holdings: 2,903,416,217

Your share equals your proportional stake or holdings.

Check your allocations here: https://lastchadstanding.com/docs#airdrop-calculator
